chinese_text: 執大象，天下往。往而不害，
translation_text: To him who holds in his hands the Great Image (of the invisible Dao), the whole world repairs.
translation_text_raw: To him who holds in his hands the Great Image (of the invisible Dao), the whole world repairs.

translation_text: Men resort to him, and receive no hurt, but (find) rest, peace, and the feeling of ease.
translation_text_raw: Men resort to him, and receive no hurt, but (find) rest, peace, and the feeling of ease.

translation_text: Music and dainties will make the passing guest stop (for a time).
translation_text_raw: Music and dainties will make the passing guest stop (for a time).

chinese_text: 視之不足見，聽之不足聞，用之不足既。
translation_text: But though the Dao as it comes from the mouth, seems insipid and has no flavour, though it seems not worth being looked at or listened to, the use of it is inexhaustible.
translation_text_raw: But though the Dao as it comes from the mouth, seems insipid and has no flavour, though it seems not worth being looked at or listened to, the use of it is inexhaustible.
